creator: thomas.dreibholz@gmail.com
text:
Support for /etc/profile.d would indeed be useful. When creating packages of software making customisations of the profile, it is helpful to have a per-package profile configuration, instead of having to merge things into a single /etc/profile file during installation. This particularly makes a safe and clean deinstallation difficult.

Package installation -> add a package-specific file to /etc/profile.d
Package removal -> remove the file
